gloss: don't even try, no way (flat rejection)
sent1: Nem vem com desculpa, cê sabia da hora.
sent1_en: Don't even try with excuses, you knew what time it was.
sent2: Nem vem que eu não vou emprestar o carro de novo.
sent2_en: Don't even try, I'm not lending you the car again.
notes: Shuts down a request or excuse before it's even finished; flat, informal rejection.

sent1: Que isso, imagina, não precisava trazer nada.
sent1_en: Oh come on, really, you didn't need to bring anything.
sent2: Desculpa o atraso! Que isso, nem percebi.
sent2_en: Sorry for being late! Don't worry about it, I didn't even notice.
notes: Polite formula to deflect thanks or an apology, minimizing the fuss.
cuidado: ⚠️ No significa '¿qué es esto?'. Es una fórmula de cortesía para restar importancia a un agradecimiento o disculpa.

sent1: Imagina, não foi incômodo nenhum te ajudar.
sent1_en: Don't mention it, it was no trouble at all helping you.
sent2: Vou te pagar amanhã, prometo. Imagina, pode ser quando quiser.
sent2_en: I'll pay you back tomorrow, I promise. No worries, whenever you want.
notes: Polite deflection used to dismiss thanks, apologies, or worry.
cuidado: ⚠️ No es 'imagínate' literal; es una forma cortés de decir 'de nada' o 'no te preocupes'.

sent1: Magina, cê não tá atrapalhando nada.
sent1_en: No way, you're not bothering anyone at all.
sent2: Ah desculpa se eu incomodei. Magina, fica tranquilo.
sent2_en: Oh sorry if I bothered you. Don't worry, relax.
notes: Very casual spoken reduction of 'imagina'; same meaning and use.
ear: imagina -> magina: initial unstressed i- drops in fast speech

sent1: Fala sério, ele ganhou na loteria de novo?
sent1_en: No way, he won the lottery again?
sent2: Ela terminou com o namorado por mensagem. Fala sério, que absurdo.
sent2_en: She broke up with her boyfriend over text. Seriously, how absurd.
notes: Expresses disbelief or emphasis; not a literal command to 'speak seriously'.
cuidado: ⚠️ No es una orden literal de 'habla en serio'; expresa incredulidad o énfasis.

sent1: Cê já viu aquele filme novo que todo mundo comenta?
sent1_en: Have you already seen that new movie everyone's talking about?
sent2: Cê vai no aniversário da Bia esse sábado?
sent2_en: Are you going to Bia's birthday this Saturday?
notes: Extremely common spoken reduction of 'você', used constantly in casual speech.
ear: você -> cê: first syllable drops entirely

sent1: Cês vão pra praia esse fim de semana?
sent1_en: Are you all going to the beach this weekend?
sent2: Cês já comeram? Fiz comida pra todo mundo.
sent2_en: Have you all eaten already? I made food for everyone.
notes: Plural spoken reduction of 'vocês', used when addressing a group.
ear: vocês -> cês: first syllable drops entirely

sent1: Tá chovendo muito lá fora, leva um guarda-chuva.
sent1_en: It's raining a lot outside, take an umbrella.
sent2: Ela tá com raiva de mim, mas não sei por quê.
sent2_en: She's angry with me, but I don't know why.
notes: Universal spoken reduction of 'está'; used everywhere in fast speech.

sent1: Tô com muita fome, vamo comer logo.
sent1_en: I'm really hungry, let's eat soon.
sent2: Não vou poder ir na festa, tô meio doente hoje.
sent2_en: I won't be able to go to the party, I'm a bit sick today.
notes: Spoken reduction of 'estou', extremely frequent in everyday speech.
ear: estou -> tô: reduces to a single syllable

sent1: Eu tava dormindo quando você ligou.
sent1_en: I was sleeping when you called.
sent2: Ela tava tão nervosa antes da prova.
sent2_en: She was so nervous before the exam.
notes: Spoken reduction of 'estava', very common in past-tense narration.

sent1: Eles tavam esperando cê chegar.
sent1_en: They were waiting for you to arrive.
sent2: As crianças tavam brincando no quintal a tarde toda.
sent2_en: The kids were playing in the backyard all afternoon.
notes: Spoken reduction of 'estavam', plural of 'tava'.

sent1: Eles tão numa reunião, liga depois.
sent1_en: They're in a meeting, call back later.
sent2: As lojas tão cheias hoje por causa da promoção.
sent2_en: The stores are packed today because of the sale.
notes: Spoken reduction of 'estão', plural verb form.
cuidado: ⚠️ No es el 'tan' español (tan bueno, tan grande). Es la forma reducida de 'estão' (ellos están).

sent1: Eu num sei se vou poder ir na festa amanhã.
sent1_en: I don't know if I'll be able to go to the party tomorrow.
sent2: Ele mora num apartamento pequeno perto do centro.
sent2_en: He lives in a small apartment near downtown.
notes: Two meanings depending on context: reduced spoken 'não' before a verb ('num sei' = 'não sei'), or the contraction of 'em' + 'um' meaning 'in a'.
cuidado: ⚠️ Cuidado: 'num' aquí no es una preposición española; es la reducción de 'não' o la contracción de 'em um', según el contexto.
ear: não -> num before a verb: nasalizes into a single syllable

sent1: Ela mora numa casa bem simples com os pais.
sent1_en: She lives in a very simple house with her parents.
sent2: A gente se conheceu numa festa de aniversário.
sent2_en: We met at a birthday party.
notes: Contraction of 'em' + 'uma', feminine counterpart of 'num'.

sent1: Vou comprar um presente pra minha irmã.
sent1_en: I'm going to buy a gift for my sister.
sent2: A gente precisa sair cedo pra pegar o ônibus.
sent2_en: We need to leave early to catch the bus.
notes: Universal spoken reduction of 'para', used across almost every register.

sent1: Vou levar as crianças pro parque hoje à tarde.
sent1_en: I'm going to take the kids to the park this afternoon.
sent2: Ele mandou o relatório pro chefe antes do prazo.
sent2_en: He sent the report to the boss before the deadline.
notes: Contraction of 'para' + 'o', masculine counterpart of 'pra'.

gloss: for me / to me (also used informally as subject)
sent1: Isso aqui é muito importante pra mim, viu?
sent1_en: This is really important to me, you know?
sent2: Pra mim, esse plano não vai dar certo.
sent2_en: In my opinion, this plan isn't going to work out.
notes: Standard 'para mim', but informally also used where standard grammar would require 'eu' as subject (e.g., 'pra mim tá bom').
cuidado: ⚠️ En español 'para mí' nunca es sujeto de oración; en portugués informal, 'pra mim' sí puede usarse así.

sent1: Vamo logo, o filme já vai começar.
sent1_en: Let's go quickly, the movie's about to start.
sent2: Vamo lá ver o que aconteceu com ela.
sent2_en: Let's go see what happened with her.
notes: Casual spoken reduction of 'vamos', dropping the final -s.

sent1: Bora, já tá tarde e a gente precisa sair.
sent1_en: Come on, it's already late and we need to leave.
sent2: Ninguém quer ficar em casa hoje. Bora pro shopping?
sent2_en: Nobody wants to stay home today. Let's go to the mall?
notes: Very common invitation marker, shortened from 'embora', used to prompt action.

sent1: Tá bom, eu vou fazer do jeito que você quer.
sent1_en: Okay, I'll do it the way you want.
sent2: Podemos remarcar pra sexta? Tá bom, sem problema.
sent2_en: Can we reschedule to Friday? Okay, no problem.
notes: General agreement marker meaning 'okay' or 'alright', very frequent in conversation.
